parameters.command:
=set -e
repo="{{ $env.EMPIRE_REPO_PATH }}"
backup_dir="${BACKUP_DIR:-/var/backups/strledger}"
tmp="/tmp/strledger-restore-test-$$"
mkdir -p "$tmp"

# Find the newest .tar.gz backup
latest=$(ls -1t "$backup_dir"/*.tar.gz 2>/dev/null | head -1 || true)
if [ -z "$latest" ]; then
  printf '{"ok":false,"reason":"no-backups-found","backupDir":"%s"}\n' "$backup_dir"
  exit 0
fi
backup_age_days=$(awk -v n="$(date -u +%s)" -v m="$(date -u -r "$latest" +%s 2>/dev/null || stat -c %Y "$latest")" 'BEGIN{printf "%.1f", (n-m)/86400}')

# Extract into tmp and probe a sentinel file
if ! tar -xzf "$latest" -C "$tmp" 2>/dev/null; then
  printf '{"ok":false,"reason":"extract-failed","backup":"%s"}\n' "$latest"
  rm -rf "$tmp"
  exit 0
fi

# Sentinels: PROGRESS.md + ops/atlas.yaml must exist after extract
found_progress=0; found_atlas=0
[ -f "$tmp/PROGRESS.md" ] && found_progress=1
[ -f "$tmp/ops/atlas.yaml" ] && found_atlas=1
# Sometimes archives root inside a folder; check one level deep too.
if [ "$found_progress" = "0" ]; then
  if find "$tmp" -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -name PROGRESS.md -print -quit | grep -q .; then found_progress=1; fi
fi
if [ "$found_atlas" = "0" ]; then
  if find "$tmp" -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 3 -path '*/ops/atlas.yaml' -print -quit | grep -q .; then found_atlas=1; fi
fi

file_count=$(find "$tmp" -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
rm -rf "$tmp"

ok=true
reason=""
if [ "$found_progress" = "0" ] || [ "$found_atlas" = "0" ]; then
  ok=false
  reason="sentinel-files-missing"
fi
printf '{"ok":%s,"reason":"%s","backup":"%s","backupAgeDays":%s,"fileCount":%s,"foundProgress":%s,"foundAtlas":%s}\n' "$ok" "$reason" "$latest" "$backup_age_days" "$file_count" "$found_progress" "$found_atlas"
